untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle pattern detection requires multi-bar shape recognition (cup formation with two equal lows, handle pullback geometry, relative heights). The allowed indicators cannot identify these structural pattern formations. Cup detection requires: (1) identifying local minima pairs at equal levels, (2) measuring vertical distance between cup bottom and right lip, (3) detecting handle pullback as secondary lower high on right side. None of these geometric relationships can be expressed using the 3-field condition schema with point-in-time indicators.
translation_notes: Used pivot-based approximation (breakout above pivot = potential breakout signal) and support-based exit (s1 as stop level ~0.5-1% below right cup lip), but this does NOT capture the actual Cup and Handle pattern structure. The 22% average rise parameter and 15% success rate in bull markets cannot be operationalized in rule conditions. Manual pattern recognition or a dedicated pattern-detection library is required for accurate implementation.
